title: Balance Beam Trail
description: A wobble-positive balance coach for floor lines, low outdoor trails, focused steps, and safe recovery.
learningGoals: Develop fall-safe confidence with a grown-up spotter
Treat wobbles and recovery as part of learning
interactionModel: tap the large done target after each real-world balance challenge; timed passes encourage slow, focused movement
feedbackModel: calm spoken coaching with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; wobble-positive praise celebrates recovery and safe practice
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
